texto: If you listen closely you will hear the spirits sigha lesson lost on humans
autor: an enchanting lullaby:Mercy lies in nature’s hands and bound to it we grow.Of the earth we came to be and of the earth we’ll go.
explicacao: Citação de an enchanting lullaby:Mercy lies in nature’s hands and bound to it we grow.Of the earth we came to be and of the earth we’ll go. sobre temas ligados a fe. “If you listen closely you will hear the spirits sigha lesson lost on humans” articula fe, nicoline-evans, hall-of-mosses em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como hall-of-mosses.
